name: French Country Potato Salad with Turkey
recipeIngredient: 9 oz frozen french cut green beans
1 large Baking potato (about 1/2 lb), cut into 2 1/2 x 1/2 x 1/2 inch strips
4 oz Cooked turkey breast, cut into 2 1/2 x 1/2 x 1/2 inch strips (3/4 cup)
3 tbsp Prepared lowcal Italian salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook green beans according to directions; drain.
2. In a large non-stick skillet, combine the potato strips and 3/4 cup of water. Cover and cook over medium heat for 8-10 minutes, or until tender. Add remaining 1/4 cup water, turkey, parsley, basil, sage, and bouillon; cook until thoroughly heated. Stir in cooked green beans. Place on serving platter and drizzle with salad dressing. Serve immediately.
